name: Dream Nexus
permanentEffect: You may treat systems that contain nexus tokens as adjacent to each other.

name: The Waking
window: At the end of the status phase:
windowEffect: Any player with ships in a system that contains a nexus token may remove 1 token from 1 of those systems.

name: Incomprehensible Form
window: When 1 of your ships would be destroyed during space combat:
windowEffect: You may instead remove 1 nexus token from the active system.

name: Refraction
window: After another player produces 1 or more hits against your units during space combat:
windowEffect: You may assign 1 of those hits to 1 of your non-fighter ships in an adjacent system.

name: Fragmentation
window: After one of your non-fighter ships in the active system is destroyed during combat:
windowEffect: You may place 1 fighter from your reinforcements in that system.

name: Phoenix Rising
window: When you roll for your infantry's text ability:
windowEffect: On a result of 9 or 10, you may choose for that unit to not be destroyed. If you do; you cannot resolve that unit's text ability.

name: Beauty in Destruction
window: Once per action, when one of your units is destroyed during combat:
windowEffect: You may spend 1 token from your strategy pool to gain that unit's corresponding unit upgrade technology.

name: Mechanized Military
windowEffect: Take the 2 additional Iron Tide mechs and place them in your reinforcements; You have 6 mechs.

name: Exo-Atmospheric
permanentEffect: Your mechs count as ships when in the space area of a system and may participate in space combat.

name: Iron Resilience
permanentEffect: Your ground forces cannot be removed or destroyed by any game effects outside of combat or when exceeding capacity.

name: Planetary Reconfiguration
windowEffect: You may attach 1 of your designs from your reinforcements to that planet if it does not already have one. When you lose control of a planet with a design attached to it, return that card to your reinforcements. Designs do not count as attachments for the purposes of scoring objectives.

name: Efficient Governance
window: During the agenda phase, after an outcome you voted for is resolved:
windowEffect: Ready up to 2 of your planets.

name: System Breach
window: When another player places a structure:
windowEffect: You may place one of that player's control tokens on your faction sheet.

name: Control Network
windowEffect: Before a player whose control token is on your faction sheet rolls dice for SPACE CANNON, you may remove 1 of those tokens to apply -1 to those dice. While you are the active player, you may remove a player's control token from your faction sheet to use the PRODUCTION ability of a space dock controlled by that player that you are blockading as if it were your own to produce ships.

name: Ransomware
windowEffect: A player whose control token is on your faction sheet may give you 1 trade good to remove 1 of their control tokens there.

name: Doctrine
windowEffect: Take the 6 Natau doctrines and place them in your reinforcements. Then, choose 2 doctrines; place them in your play area and ready them.

name: Paradigm
window: At the start of the status phase:
windowEffect: Ready each doctrine. Then, replace 1 of the doctrines in your play area with a doctrine from your reinforcements.

name: Decree
permanentEffect: You gain the text abilities of a doctrine while it is in your play area.
